attributes.llm.input_messages.message.content:
You are a resume screener evaluating job-relevant qualifications only.

JOB REQUISITION: Senior Backend Engineer
Required skills: Python, SQL, REST API Design, System Design, Docker, Git
Nice-to-have skills: Kubernetes, Redis, AWS, Kafka, GraphQL
Minimum years experience: 4

CANDIDATE PROFILE (anonymized — no name or demographic information):
Skills: System Design, Python, REST API Design, Git, Docker, AWS, GraphQL
Certifications: None
Education:
- BS in Computer Science, University of Michigan (2015)
Experience:
- Senior Software Engineer at Stark Industries (2023–2024): Delivered Python-based feature serving thousands of daily users; Mentored team members on best practices for Docker
- Staff Engineer at Initech (2021–2023): Architected scalable infrastructure leveraging Python; Architected scalable infrastructure leveraging Docker
- Senior Software Engineer at Aperture Science (2020–2021): Reduced on-call burden 40% by improving observability with Git; Optimized performance using AWS, reducing latency by 30%; Optimized performance using GraphQL, reducing latency by 30%
- Senior Software Engineer at Hooli (2019–2020): Optimized performance using System Design, reducing latency by 30%; Led adoption of REST API Design, improving team velocity by 20%

Score this candidate 0–100 based solely on job-relevant qualifications.
Do not infer or consider demographic signals.

Respond with valid JSON only, no other text:
{"score": <integer 0-100>, "rationale": "<one sentence explaining the score>"}
